author: gb9t
content: Iter 76 result: drivers/md/raid0.md (md raid0 - raid0.c ~841 lines smallest md driver; per-array R0Conf with strip_zone[] + per-zone non-uniform-disk grouping + per-bio chunk-boundary split + sector→(zone, disk, offset) mapping + any-disk-fail → array-fail strict) + virt/kvm/x86-svm-asid.md (AMD ASID TLB-tagging - in svm.c ~150-200 lines; per-CPU SvmCpuData with next_asid+asid_generation+min/max_asid + new_asid per-vCPU assign + per-vmenter generation-check + ASID overflow → FLUSH_ALL_ASIDS + SEV ASID range reserved (1..max_sev_asid) + nested-SVM distinct L2 ASID + Intel-VPID analog). 102 Tier-3s total. Next iter: drivers/md/dm-snapshot.md (CoW snapshot target) + virt/kvm/x86-vmx-eventinj.md (vmcs event injection deep-dive).
